description_long: This object is a shotgun with a robust, metallic body and a dark synthetic or polymer stock. The barrel is long and cylindrical, with a matte finish and subtle ribbing along the top, suggesting a focus on durability and accuracy. The receiver and action area are visibly reinforced, with a prominent trigger guard and a clearly defined trigger. The fore-end appears to be textured for grip, and the overall design is streamlined for practical use. The coloration is primarily a mix of metallic gray, black, and some brown or reddish accents, giving it a modern yet utilitarian appearance. The shotgun's components, such as the barrel, stock, and action, are all distinct and well-defined, indicating a functional and reliable weapon suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, metallic shotgun with a long barrel, dark synthetic stock, and reinforced action, featuring a streamlined and utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the metallic barrel, dark stock, and detailed receiver.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the twin barrels and muzzle openings, with the ribbing and sighting rib visible on top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the other side of the stock and action with clear details of the fore-end.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock's end and the alignment of the barrels, with the trigger guard and grip area visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel with visible ribbing along the top and equal barrel lengths
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
